title: AI Content Transformation Platform
description: An AI content system that turned long transcripts into reviewable, schedulable posts instead of a manual content bottleneck.
bestFit: Teams with transcript-heavy marketing workflows who want AI assistance without losing review control.
constraints: The system needed to handle very long transcripts without collapsing quality.
Drafts needed human review and scheduling controls instead of auto-posting blind.
problem: Content creators record hours of valuable content in podcasts and webinars but struggle to repurpose it into engaging social media posts.

Manual conversion is time-consuming, maintaining consistent voice across posts is challenging, and identifying the most shareable moments from lengthy transcripts requires expertise most creators lack.
solution: Built a pipeline that chunks long transcripts, extracts candidate insights, and turns them into reviewable post drafts instead of forcing someone to mine the transcript by hand.
Added hook frameworks, scheduling controls, and timezone-aware publishing logic so the system was useful as an operating tool, not just a content generator.
Used real-time progress updates to make the processing feel trustworthy while the longer AI workflow ran in the background.
result: Turned a manual transcript-to-post workflow into a working system that extracts insights, drafts posts, and lets a human review before anything gets scheduled.
Proved a repeatable pattern for AI-assisted content operations where voice control, long inputs, and scheduling reliability all matter.
